01-create-workspace.title: Create hosted workspace
01-create-workspace.body: The playground creates a hosted Onboarded workspace and receives a proxied git remote without exposing browser credentials.

02-edit-committed.title: Edit hosted config
02-edit-committed.body: Saving a hosted workspace edit routes through the hosted RPC service, then the browser-side git helper commits and pushes the updated snapshot.

03-hosted-history.title: Inspect hosted history
03-hosted-history.body: The History panel reads the browser-side git clone and shows the hosted edit commit with provenance and a raw file diff.

04-deploy-pull.title: Pull through hosted deploy
04-deploy-pull.body: The hosted Deploy panel connects to the mock Onboarded API, pulls the account snapshot into the browser git store, and reaches an empty plan.

05-deploy-apply.title: Apply hosted draft
05-deploy-apply.body: After a hosted form edit, the Deploy panel plans one update, applies it to the mock remote, and re-plans to a fixed point.

06-deploy-history.title: Inspect deploy commit
06-deploy-history.body: The hosted apply lands as a system-authored git commit, including the updated lockfile, and is visible in hosted History.
